riffLord.name: Riff Lord
riffLord.intro: A garage guitarist with too many knobs to tweak.
riffLord.victoryLine: ...alright, you've got the chops. I'll see you at the next show.
riffLord.defeatLine: I get to write the setlist now.

lowEndDemon.name: Low-End Demon
lowEndDemon.intro: Anchor of every bar band on the floating islands.
lowEndDemon.victoryLine: Pocket's still mine. You're just renting it.
lowEndDemon.defeatLine: Couldn't lock in. Need a session.

beatSmith.name: Beat Smith
beatSmith.intro: Sets the tempo for half the venues you'll ever play.
beatSmith.victoryLine: Stay on the click. That's the only rule.
beatSmith.defeatLine: You held the pocket better than me.

synthWizard.name: Synth Wizard
synthWizard.intro: Brought their entire patch library and a polite smile.
synthWizard.victoryLine: I'll send you the preset. Eventually.
synthWizard.defeatLine: Looks like I need to revisit my chord voicings.

vocalStorm.name: Vocal Storm
vocalStorm.intro: Voice cuts through any mix. Knows it.
vocalStorm.victoryLine: Was that supposed to be the chorus?
vocalStorm.defeatLine: Lost the high note. I'll warm up next time.
